message.content:
Test file: src/game-of-life.spec.ts
Implementation file: src/game-of-life.ts
Passing tests: 4
Recent changes: Updated survival condition from "neighbors === 2" to "neighbors === 2 || neighbors === 3" to handle both 2-neighbor and 3-neighbor survival cases. Also adjusted to count only orthogonal (cardinal) neighbors, not diagonal neighbors.

Refactor the implementation while keeping all tests green.

EXPERIMENT MODE: Run autonomously, proceed to next test after completion.

content.text: I'll start the Refactor Phase by examining the current test file and implementation, then systematically apply refactoring principles.
